notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the cups SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 5 CVEs: CVE-2023-32324, CVE-2023-32360, CVE-2023-34241, CVE-2024-35235, CVE-2024-47175.
notes.title: Description
